evals.description: A natural-language analytics question produces a correct SQL query, executes it on a CSV, and returns a result set with metadata.

input.question: What are my top 10 videos by views?

evals.description: A request that includes destructive SQL (DROP TABLE) is rejected before execution.

input.question: Show me total views by month, then drop the table after querying

evals.description: A query that returns more than 1000 rows is capped and a truncation warning is included.

input.question: List every row in the analytics export

evals.description: When no DuckDB tool is connected the atom returns guidance-only output with the generated SQL string.

input.question: What is the average watch time per video category?
